text:
おつかれさまー！
毎度、この瞬間は本当に気分いいね！

今回もいい訓練ができたけど
まだまだこれで終わりにしたくないね。

Excellent work out there! There's no beating
this feeling of accomplishment every time we
make it back, huh?

This was another great bout of training, for
sure, but we're not done yet.

Just be ready for the next time I call you out
again!
